SparSCit

  • API Reference
SparSCit
  • API Reference
  • Advanced (sparscit.adv)
  • Advanced Plotting (sparscit.adv.pl)
  • View page source

Advanced Plotting (sparscit.adv.pl)

Visualization functions for landscape plots, dynamics, HMMs, and summaries.

Landscape Plots

  • sparscit.advanced.plotting._2d.landscape2d() — 2D landscape plot

  • sparscit.advanced.plotting._2d.contour2d() — 2D contour plot

  • sparscit.advanced.plotting._2d.categorical2d() — 2D categorical plot

  • sparscit.advanced.plotting._3d.landscape3d() — 3D landscape plot

  • sparscit.advanced.plotting._function.slice() — Slice a landscape

Dynamics & HMMs

  • sparscit.advanced.plotting._dynamics.time_correlation() — Plot time correlations

  • sparscit.advanced.plotting._dynamics.differential_dynamics() — Plot differential dynamics

  • sparscit.advanced.plotting._dynamics.summary_overtime() — Plot summary over time

  • sparscit.advanced.plotting._hmm.hidden_states() — Plot HMM hidden states

  • sparscit.advanced.plotting._hmm.hmm_observations() — Plot HMM observations

  • sparscit.advanced.plotting._hmm.hmm_likelihoods() — Plot HMM likelihoods

  • sparscit.advanced.plotting._hmm.transition_matrix() — Plot HMM transition matrix

Community & Features

  • sparscit.advanced.plotting._distances.active_subclusters() — Plot active sub-clusters

  • sparscit.advanced.plotting._dendrogram.community_dendrogram() — Plot community dendrogram

  • sparscit.advanced.plotting._features.venn_active_overlap() — Venn diagram of active feature overlap

Summaries

  • sparscit.advanced.plotting._summary.summary_boxplot() — Boxplot summary

  • sparscit.advanced.plotting._summary.summary_heatmap() — Heatmap summary

Color Utilities

  • sparscit.advanced.plotting._cmap.custom_cmap() — Create a custom colormap

  • sparscit.advanced.plotting._cmap.draw_cbar() — Draw a colorbar

sparscit.advanced.plotting.active_subclusters(adata: AnnData, embedding_key: str, obsm_key: str, r_index: int, *, embedding_plot_kwargs: dict = {}, size: float = 5, background_size: float = 2, background_alpha: float = 0.5, data_override: ndarray | None = None, make_categorical: bool = True, include_arrows: bool = False, show: bool = True) → Figure | None[source]

Plot active subclusters

Parameters:

  • adata

  • embedding_key

  • obsm_key

  • r_index

  • embedding_plot_kwargs

  • size

  • background_size

  • background_alpha

  • data_override

  • make_categorical

  • include_arrows

  • show

sparscit.advanced.plotting.categorical2d(adata: AnnData, griddata_key: str, *, summary: bool = True) → None[source]

Plot categorical in landscape embedding

sparscit.advanced.plotting.community_dendrogram(adata: AnnData, fontsize: int = 10, *, padding: float = 0.5, additive: bool = True, log_scale: bool = True, show_labels: bool = True, show: bool = True) → None | Figure[source]
Parameters:

  • fontsize

  • log_scale – Whether branch height is log scale

sparscit.advanced.plotting.contour2d(adata: AnnData, griddata_key: str, feature_name: str, levels: int = 5, *, summary: bool = True, cmap: str = 'RdBu_r') → None[source]

Plot numerical as contour in landscape embedding

sparscit.advanced.plotting.custom_cmap(name: Literal['gray', 'with_color', 'bwr'])[source]
sparscit.advanced.plotting.differential_dynamics(dynamics, *, activity_threshold: float = 10.0, lfc_threshold: float = 0.2, alpha: float = 0.05, active_only: bool = True, score_key: str = 'score', activity_key: str = 'base_mean', show: bool = True)[source]
sparscit.advanced.plotting.draw_cbar(cmap, vminmax: tuple[float, float] = (0, 1))[source]
sparscit.advanced.plotting.hidden_states(hmm: HMMWrapper, xminmax: tuple[int, int])[source]
sparscit.advanced.plotting.hmm_likelihoods(hmm: HMMWrapper, data, data_layers: list[str])[source]
sparscit.advanced.plotting.hmm_observations(data: ndarray, *, cmaps: list[str] = ('Blues', 'Reds', 'Greens'))[source]
sparscit.advanced.plotting.landscape2d(adata: AnnData, griddata_key: str, feature_name: str, *, summary: bool = True, vminmax: None | tuple[float, float] = None, cmap: str = 'gist_earth') → None[source]

Plot numerical in 2D landscape embedding

sparscit.advanced.plotting.landscape3d(griddata: Griddata, feature_name: str, vminmax: tuple[float, float] | None = None, *, shade_data: Griddata | None = None, shade_vminmax: tuple[float, float] | None = None, shade_qmax: float | None = None, cmap: str = 'gist_earth', shade_cmap: str = 'Reds', antialiased: bool = False, extra_shade_weight: float = 1.0, azaltdeg: tuple[int, int] = (270, 45), ticksize: float | None = None, negative_yaxis: bool = True, show_xaxis: bool = False, fontname: str = 'Helvetica', figsize: tuple = (6, 6), x_aspect: int = 1, label_pad: float = 2, show: bool = True) → None | Figure[source]

Plot numerical as 3d in landscape embedding

Parameters:

  • griddata – Griddata for height

  • vminmax – Tuple of vmin and vmax for color normalization

  • shade_vminmax – vminmax for shade_data

  • shade_data – Optional Griddata for coloring the 3d surface

sparscit.advanced.plotting.slice(griddatas: list[Griddata], slice_coord: tuple[complex, complex] | tuple[int, int], griddata_categorical: Griddata | None = None, *, include_std: bool = False, show: bool = True, labels: list[str] | None = None) → None | Figure[source]

Plot slices.

Parameters:

  • griddatas

  • slice_coord

  • griddata_categorical

  • include_std

  • show

  • labels

sparscit.advanced.plotting.summary_boxplot(data: dict[str, dict[str, csr_matrix]], labels_ordered: list[str], colors: list[str], log_scale: bool = False, log_scalar: list[float] | None = None, ignore_zero: bool = True, relative_max_per_gene: bool = False, normalize_per_gene: bool = False, cut_on_max_whisker: bool = False, *, ylabel: str | None = None, text_size: int = 7, show: bool = True)[source]
sparscit.advanced.plotting.summary_heatmap(data: dict[str, dict[str, csr_matrix]], labels_ordered: list[str], memberships: ndarray, cmaps: list[str], *, log_scale: bool = False, modality_weights: list[float], vminmaxs: list[tuple | None] | None = None, show_labels: bool = True, show: bool = True)[source]
sparscit.advanced.plotting.summary_overtime(summary: SummaryData, labels: list[str], colors: list[str], cell_index: int = 0, *, yminmax: tuple[float, float] | None = None, show_all_lines: bool = False, weak_line_style: dict = {'alpha': 0.1, 'linewidth': 0.5}, line_style: dict = {'linewidth': 2}) → None[source]
sparscit.advanced.plotting.time_correlation(adatas: list[AnnData], configs: list[LayerConfig], obs_key: str, cell_type: str, time_key: str, feature_name: str, labels: list[str] | None = None, colors: list[str] | None = None, scalars: list[int] | None = None, *, rank_signal: bool = False, plot_style: Literal['scatter', 'smooth', 'both'] = 'scatter', gauss_sigma: float = 3, binsize: float = 1, plot_zeros: bool = True, yminmax: tuple[float, float] | None = None, scatter_style: dict = {'s': 5}, xlabels: list | None = None, line_style: dict = {'linewidth': 5}, show: bool = False) → None[source]
sparscit.advanced.plotting.transition_matrix(hmm: HMMWrapper, cmap: str = 'Blues_r', *, add_: int = 10)[source]
sparscit.advanced.plotting.venn_active_overlap(activities: list[ndarray], *, labels: list[str] | None = None, show: bool = True, return_raw: bool = False) → None[source]
